IDirect3DPalette8

IDirect3DPalette8 is a new resource on the Xbox game system which replaces the functionality of the Direct3D implementation of palettes. Rather than using a single palette to describe all textures, IDirect3DPalette8 supports multiple palettes of a user-specified size.

Palettes are only relevant for surfaces and textures with a D3DFORMAT of D3DFMT_P8.

The methods of the IDirect3DPalette8 interface can be organized into the following groups.

Locking Lock
Unlock
Information GetSize

IDirect3DPalette8 inherits from IDirect3DResource8.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8.h.
  Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DResource8, IDirect3DDevice8::CreatePalette, IDirect3DDevice8::CreateCubeTexture, IDirect3DDevice8::CreateTexture, IDirect3DDevice8::CreateVolumeTexture, D3DFORMAT, D3DPALETTESIZE
